Petition To Determine Those Persons Entitled To Distribution Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-29-2008 Continued To Jan-26-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Guilio Accornero for Benjamin Deatherage (Petitioner). Conrad Donner for Melinda McCracken and James McCracken.

Counsel agreed to mediation and stated that discovery still needed to be conducted. Mediation is to be completed by January 26, 2009, (order for the same to be signed by the Court). The matter was continued to January 26, 2009 for status on the mediation.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda/ R.Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

Petition For Order Setting Aside And Vacating Order For Final Distribution.
Off Calendar Jul-10-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marta McNeill and Caroline Hinshaw for the Co-Administrators. Giulio Accornero for Benjamin Deatherage (Claimant/Moving Party).

The parties presented oral argument to support there positions. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Karen Farnsworth CSR#5162. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M.Loos.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-25-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Caroline Hinshaw for James and Melinda McCracken, Co-Administrator.
Ms. Hinshaw stated that the estate was in bad shape when the decedent past, that the family members charged $20.00 per hour and the extraordinary fees was $6,264.00, and no objections were made.

The matter was taken under submission.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, Bailiff: Deputy Handa.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-09-2007 Granted Per Written Order
